content: CTL takes 42 days / 6 weeks of data before it becomes meaningful. Cold-start: initialize CTL=0 and ATL=0; the model self-corrects but TSB will be misleadingly positive for the first 6 weeks. Industry ramp rate: 5-8 CTL points/week max. Displaying CTL/TSB numbers to users before 4 weeks of data is misleading.
